hops.context: This paper is focused on the design, fabrication, and performance evaluation of the first-generation 4H-SiC LGADs produced by onsemi.

Laboratory evaluations have been conducted to assess their performance, temperature stability, and the effectiveness of their design in signal amplification, with initial results aligning closely with TCAD simulation predictions.

question: What method was employed to evaluate the initial performance and temperature stability of the 4H-SiC LGADs produced by onsemi?

options.A: Field deployment in real-world applications to monitor performance degradation
options.B: Comparative analysis using previous generation SiC LGADs as a benchmark
options.C: TCAD simulation to predict performance outcomes and design effectiveness
options.D: Experimental testing under variable environmental conditions in the laboratory

explanation: The paper mentions that the initial performance and temperature stability of the 4H-SiC LGADs produced by onsemi were evaluated using TCAD simulation, which aligns closely with simulation predictions. This indicates that a TCAD simulation method was used to assess these parameters.
